Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint On Jean Sarah Wong Aka Jeansara S (Neegee); Christopher M. Wong; Jason S. Wong; Fay Wong Trust; Samuel Wong Trust; Samuel And Fay Wong Trust; Mann Wong Trust; Lilly Wong Trust; Memorandum Of Point And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Vanessa Pouladian, Christopher Wong, Tiger Work, Jean Wong, And Jason Wong
Off Calendar Oct-26-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vanessa Pouladian, Esq. (818-853-5142) of CP law Group for Defendant through Court Call.
Cantonese Court Interperter Bannie Chow.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER WONG, JASON WONG, FAY WONG TRUST, SAMUEL WONG TRUST, SAMUEL AND FAY WONG TRUST, MANN WONG TRUST, LILLY WONG TRUST, JEAN WONG'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint On Jean Sarah Wong Aka Jeansara S (Neegee); Christopher M. Wong; Jason S. Wong; Fay Wong Trust; Samuel Wong Trust; Samuel And Fay Wong Trust; Mann Wong Trust; Lilly Wong Trust.

Defendants' motion to quash service of summons is granted. No opposition filed.** (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript) Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)

**After the hearing, The Court is informed of a Dismissal of entire action filed on 10/25/17. The Court vacates the ruling and takes the matter off-calendar in light of the Dismissal on file.**

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And Motion To Quash, Limit Or Modify, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Vanessa Pouladian Iin Support; Proposed Order
Off Calendar Oct-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Vanessa Pouladian of the law offices of CP Law Group (818-853-5142) appears as counsel for defendants/moving parties

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS TIGER WONG and DYNASTY PROPERTIES, LLC'S Motion For Protective Order And Motion To Quash, Limit Or Modify is GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. Dynasty's request for monetary sanctions is DENIED for failure to notice the request in the Notice of Motion and failure to note the request for sanctions on the caption page. All other sanctions, if any, are DENIED. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
